entries.title: Getting Started with AI Skills for Claude Code
entries.description: Learn how to discover, install, and use AI skills to supercharge your development workflow with Claude Code and other AI assistants.

entries.title: How to Create a SKILL.md File
entries.description: A complete guide to writing effective SKILL.md files that help AI assistants understand and use your tools.

entries.title: Top MCP Servers to Try in 2025
entries.description: Explore the most popular Model Context Protocol servers that extend AI assistants with powerful integrations.

entries.title: SkillsLLM Features Guide: Discover, Compare, and Track AI Skills
entries.description: A complete walkthrough of everything you can do on SkillsLLM - browsing, voting, bookmarking, comparing skills side-by-side, and finding what other developers like.

entries.title: Caveman: The Claude Code Skill That Cuts Token Use by 65%
entries.description: How Caveman compresses Claude's responses to caveman-speak, the four modes from Lite to Classical Chinese, and what it teaches us about prompt design when token bills matter.

entries.title: Best MCP Servers in 2026: Complete Directory by Category
entries.description: A category-by-category guide to the best Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers in 2026. Databases, dev tools, productivity, search, browser automation - what to install for Claude Code, Codex, and ChatGPT.

entries.title: What is an AI Skills Marketplace? A Complete Guide for 2026
entries.description: An AI skills marketplace is a curated directory of reusable capabilities for AI coding assistants. Definitions, how they work, and how to choose between them in 2026.
